raw_text: eZone memory ingest must bypass create_task, bypass worker, bypass confirmation, save directly to file memory, and reply immediately with a short acknowledgment. Dump triggers are text commands only and must bypass worker and confirmation","decisions":"File memory is the canonical exportable orchestra memory. SQLite memory remains working internal memory. SYSTEM must be stored only as append-only jsonl files. eZone ingest must support both text and file inputs. Only the paths GLOBAL, CHATS, SYSTEM are used for orchestra memory dump. The old stack tg_agent, storage_layer, orchestra.db was removed from the confirmed core baseline. OpenRouter is the single LLM in the confirmed baseline. The prompt template for universal chat memory export must use only ASCII double quotes and strictly valid JSON","solutions":"Implemented or confirmed in chat: eZone direct ingest concept, append-only file memory structure, SYSTEM jsonl storage, dump triggers for file memory, ai_router file-memory context reading, ai_router fallback to file-memory search, JSON input normalization for typographic quotes, single-handler approach for telegram_daemon to enforce branch order, dump formatting with GLOBAL, CHAT, SYSTEM sections, restart protocol with log output after fixes","code":"Critical logic includes normalized JSON parsing before eZone detection; eZone detection by presence of at least one of system, architecture, pipeline, memory; direct save into CHATS/<chat_id>/raw.json plus append to CHATS/<chat_id>/timeline.jsonl and GLOBAL/timeline.jsonl plus append to SYSTEM/.jsonl; ordinary tasks inserted into core.db as NEW; ai_router reads SYSTEM, GLOBAL, current CHAT, related CHATS, DB memory, and web data in ordered context; ai_router OpenRouter response extracted from choices[0].message.content;
